/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/read_write_single_scalar_bin.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/read_write_single_scalar_bin.dir/read_write_single_scalar.cpp.o -o read_write_single_scalar_bin  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial/libhdf5.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdl.a -lm
